# Decision Log

| Date / Pass         | Decision                                                                 | Reason                                                                                                           | Alternatives considered                           | Risk                                                    | Follow-up                                                 |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Copy `agent-docs` source prompts into canonical `docs/` structure.       | User indicated these files are the project source docs; prompt requires `docs/PRD.md` and `docs/modules/*`.      | Leave `agent-docs` as source only.                | Duplicate docs can drift.                               | Treat `docs/` as canonical after Pass 1.                  |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Bundle Modules 0 and 1.                                                  | Prompt suggested Pass 1 as Module 0 plus Module 1; repo is empty enough to scaffold safely.                      | Stop after Module 0.                              | Larger pass increases verification load.                | Start Module 2 only after Module 1 verification.          |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Pin TypeScript to `5.9.3` instead of latest `7.0.2`.                     | Next/ESLint TypeScript tooling failed against TypeScript 7.                                                      | Keep TypeScript 7 and disable lint, or downgrade. | Older than latest compiler.                             | Revisit when Next lint stack supports TypeScript 7.       |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Pin ESLint to `9.39.4` instead of latest `10.6.0`.                       | React/Next lint plugins peer against ESLint 9 and crashed on ESLint 10.                                          | Keep ESLint 10 and remove Next lint rules.        | Older than latest linter.                               | Revisit after plugin ecosystem supports ESLint 10.        |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Override transitive `postcss` to `8.5.16`.                               | `pnpm audit` found a moderate advisory in `next > postcss <8.5.10`.                                              | Wait for a Next patch.                            | Transitive override can diverge from framework default. | Remove override once Next depends on patched PostCSS.     |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Approve build scripts only for `sharp` and `unrs-resolver`.              | pnpm blocked their install/postinstall scripts; they are expected transitive packages for Next/resolver tooling. | Approve all builds or block scripts.              | Supply-chain script execution risk.                     | Keep allowlist narrow and review on dependency upgrades.  |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Use `@playwright/test` and install Chromium browser binary.              | E2E runner requires the official test package and browser binary.                                                | Keep only `playwright` package or skip E2E.       | Browser binary adds local setup time/storage.           | Future agents can run `corepack pnpm test:e2e`.           |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 1 | Make `verify` use `corepack pnpm` internally.                            | Bare `pnpm` was unavailable in the resumed Windows shell.                                                        | Require PATH changes outside repo.                | Slightly more verbose script.                           | Keep unless all environments reliably expose `pnpm`.      |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 2 | Connect local repository to `neo1415/nem-life-poc` and push baseline.    | User provided GitHub repo and asked to connect/push before Module 2.                                             | Delay push until after Module 2.                  | Remote was empty, so low risk.                          | Continue pushing verified module commits.                 |
| 2026-07-10 / Pass 2 | Start Module 2 with no new dependencies.                                 | Native HTML/CSS and local utilities can satisfy the first design-system pass.                                    | Add CVA/clsx/tailwind-merge/lucide/Radix.         | Slightly more local class handling code.                | Reconsider exact packages only if a component needs them. |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 3 | Build Module 3 with pure services and existing `zod`.                    | Question engine needs deterministic validation/navigation, not a form/state-machine library.                     | Add XState, React Hook Form, Zustand, analytics.  | More local service code to maintain.                    | Reconsider only if later flows prove complexity.          |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 3 | Split question catalog by domain area.                                   | Keeps config files under the steering file-size discipline and easier to review.                                 | One large `questions.ts` catalog.                 | More imports across config files.                       | Keep IDs stable as Module 4 consumes the catalog.         |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 4 | Use namespaced `sessionStorage` for Module 4 completion handoff.         | Completion page needs safe answer review without database persistence or lead capture.                           | Keep all answers only in memory.                  | Browser storage can be stale or unavailable.            | Revalidate loaded session and offer reset/start actions.  |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 4 | Keep guided flow state in React instead of adding a form/state library.  | Existing Module 3 engine and simple React state satisfy one-question-at-a-time flow.                             | Add React Hook Form, XState, or Zustand.          | Slightly more local state handling.                     | Reconsider only if later flow complexity grows.           |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 5 | Keep scoring as pure TypeScript services with config files.              | Module 5 requires deterministic, auditable scoring without new dependencies or UI-embedded logic.                | Add a rules engine or scoring package.            | More local scoring rules to maintain.                   | Revisit only if admin-editable rule complexity grows.     |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 5 | Add `/demo/scoring` as an internal demo, not a result page.              | Module 5 must prove scoring output while deferring final result UX to Module 7.                                  | Show score directly on completion page.           | Demo users may confuse it with final UX.                | Keep clear internal-demo labels until Module 7.           |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 6 | Build recommendations from Module 5 outputs without recalculating score. | Module 6 must map profile, score, and gaps while keeping scoring and recommendations separate.                   | Duplicate scoring/gap rules in recommendations.   | Mapping can miss future score areas if not tested.      | Keep fixture tests tied to scoring fixtures.              |
| 2026-07-11 / Pass 6 | Use demo/config CTA links only.                                          | Module 6 must not create real purchases, payments, lead capture, or final result UI.                             | Add real product links or payment CTAs.           | Demo links need clear labels in rendering modules.      | Module 7 can render configured demo CTAs safely.          |
